_comment: Walk-forward book freeze-stamp — RE-SEALED 2026-07-09 at the store correction (King/Murphy birth years; owner-ruled, DECISIONS v87 §30); original seal v2.5 bake 2026-07-05 (DPP-strip final consolidation). The book (s4 matrix) is id(p)-keyed, so raw-file sha256 is non-deterministic across regenerations BY DESIGN; identity is sealed on the STABLE keys (player,type,year,pick), canonicalised. ship_gates_check.py B3 compares the current S4_MATRIX stable-key sha to this baseline.
sealed_by: store correction 2026-07-09 (King/Murphy birth years), owner-ruled re-seal (DECISIONS v87 §30 — the seal should measure this version's book; re-sealed at POST-FIX values). Prior: v2.5 bake (DPP strip final consolidation: two position fields, the 34, Kako fix,
